testcase.name: test_empresa_cannot_create_predio
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_empresa_role_restrictions.py:255: in test_empresa_cannot_create_predio assert response.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403 Forbidden for predio creation, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 403 Forbidden for predio creation, got 200: {"id":"fbbf102a-96d2-4a32-8894-fedbd0673198","departamento":"54","municipio":"Bucarasica","municipio_codigo":"109","numero_predio":30000020010001,"codigo_predial_nacional":"541090001000100020000000000000","codigo_homologado":"BPP30000020010001OUEQ","zona":"00","sector":"01","manzana_vereda":"0001","terreno":"0002","terreno_num":2,"condicion_predio":"0000","predio_horizontal":"0000","tipo_registro":1,"nombre_propietario":"TEST EMPRESA","tipo_documento":"C","numero_documento":"12345678","estado_civil":null,"direccion":"TEST ADDRESS","comuna":"0","destino_economico":"A","area_terreno":100.0,"area_construida":0.0,"avaluo":10000000.0,"tipo_mutacion":null,"numero_resolucion":null,"fecha_resolucion":null,"r2":null,"vigencia":"01312026","created_by":"23d74add-f835-4e9b-b4d3-98d23637fc34","created_by_name":"Test Empresa","created_at":"2026-01-31T16:00:04.551651+00:00","updated_at":"2026-01-31T16:00:04.551662+00:00","deleted":false,"historial":[{"accion":"Predio creado","usuario":"Test Empresa","usuario_id":"23d74add-f835-4e9b-b4d3-98d23637fc34","fecha":"2026-01-31T16:00:04.551665+00:00"}]} E assert 200 == 403 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
